items.objective: Get today's highest-priority KB action before opening code.
steps: kb next
Follow the suggested command (scan, verify, fill doc, etc.)
kb next (repeat until queue is empty or you've done enough)
items.expected: Queue shrinks each cycle. When zero actionable items remain, KB is current.

items.context: After coding a feature or fixing a bug
items.objective: Keep KB grounded to real code changes.
steps: kb scan --recursive
Review impact report — find docs that drift from changed code
Edit impacted docs to reflect changes
kb verify <doc>
kb next (confirm queue updated)
items.expected: Impacted docs are updated and stamped verified. kb next no longer surfaces those docs.

items.context: New project or new module added to existing project
items.objective: Scaffold stub docs from source code automatically.
steps: kb bootstrap --dry-run (preview what would be created)
kb bootstrap
kb index
kb next (see fill-rate and what to prioritize)
items.expected: Stub docs created in correct KB tier folders. kb index shows fill rate. kb next surfaces highest-priority unfilled docs.

items.context: Starting a significant new piece of work (feature, refactor, epic)
items.objective: Run Intent Start Gates before creating intent — avoid P18/P19 violations.
steps: Ask @kb or @KBRoot to start a new intent
Agent runs Gate 1: lists any in-progress intents, asks you to resolve each
Agent runs Gate 2: reports current chaos score + projected delta
Confirm or adjust scope if projected score > 80 (CHAOTIC threshold)
Agent creates intent with chaos_estimate recorded in intent.md
items.expected: Only one intent is in-progress at a time. You know the chaos cost before committing to scope.

items.context: Mid-intent: you hit a blocker that needs external input or human action
items.objective: Drop a human-gate instead of blocking the session on a question.
steps: Tell @kb: 'I need X decision before continuing'
Agent creates HG-NNN gate entry in intent folder (gates.md)
You (or another actor) resolve the gate offline
Mark gate done: agent updates gates.md status
Intent continues from where it stopped
items.expected: Session is not blocked. Gate record is visible. Work resumes cleanly after resolution.

items.context: Intent work is done and shipped
items.objective: Close the intent cleanly and update KB state.
steps: kb intent apply <id> (applies staged docs to KB)
Agent moves intent folder to _archive with timestamp
Update intent.md: lifecycle_state: closed, promotion_ready: true
kb chaos (verify score is healthy after change)
kb next (confirm no residual items from that intent)
items.expected: _active folder is clean. Archived intent is traceable. Chaos score reflects completed work.

items.objective: Keep chaos score healthy and catch doc drift before it compounds.
steps: kb chaos (read score + cognitive_reduction annotation)
kb doctor
kb status
kb scan --recursive --depth=2
Address any high-priority drift before starting new work
items.expected: Chaos score below 70 (stable). Doctor PASS. No critical docs missing. Cognitive drift annotation absent or low.

items.context: Source code changed significantly since last extraction
items.objective: Keep source mirror docs current with actual code.
steps: kb scan (check stale source mirror section)
kb extract <source-file> (for each stale or uncovered file)
Run the generated AI prompt in Copilot / Claude to fill doc content
kb verify <doc> after review
items.expected: source-index.json updated. Stale section disappears from kb scan. Coverage score improves in kb chaos.

items.context: Preparing to tag and publish a release
items.objective: Gate release on KB health — no chaotic debt, docs current.
steps: kb chaos --json (check score < 80)
kb doctor --strict
kb scan (verify no unresolved critical drift)
kb next (confirm zero critical actionable items)
Proceed to tag + publish only after all pass
items.expected: All gates pass. Release proceeds with documented and verified KB state.

items.objective: Generate release notes and update release catalog.
steps: git tag vX.Y.Z && git push origin vX.Y.Z
kb release notes vX.Y.Z --from=vX.Y.(Z-1) --format=md
Review generated notes, adjust highlights if needed
Create GitHub Release with the notes
Update TEMPLATE_CHANGELOG.md with release entry
items.expected: Release notes reflect actual git range. GitHub Release is published. TEMPLATE_CHANGELOG is current.

items.context: Downstream acceptance pass for v2.4 intent schema maintenance
items.objective: Validate cleanup and migrate behavior in a clean workspace before push/publish decisions.
steps: Create a clean test repo folder and run: npx @williamduong/kb@latest init --yes
Prepare one legacy intent with status/lifecycle_state fields under intents/_active
Run: kb migrate --to=v2.4.0 --dry-run --json and confirm proposed legacy_* mapping
Run: kb migrate --to=v2.4.0 --json and verify original status/lifecycle_state fields are removed on active/closed intents
Run: kb intent cleanup --json and confirm missing focus/wave findings are explicit
items.expected: Downstream workspace shows canonical schema fields, no duplicated renamed legacy fields on full-write intents, archive intents remain marker-only, and cleanup findings are deterministic.
